---
title: "LOO ComBat — Harmonization Performance"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(gridExtra)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

# Load Pre-computed Tables

```{r load_data}
scenario_egfr_pivot <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_scenario_summary.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
scenario_dgf_pivot  <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_scenario_summary.csv',  row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
egfr_importance     <- read.csv('results/tables/egfr_permutation_importance.csv')
dgf_importance      <- read.csv('results/tables/dgf_permutation_importance.csv')
ckd_distribution    <- read.csv('results/tables/ckd_stage_distribution.csv')

LOO_COLS   <- c("LOO: UC → M", "LOO: UM → C", "LOO: CM → U")
LOO_LABELS <- c("UC Davis + Coimbra\n→ Mayo",
                "UC Davis + Mayo\n→ Coimbra",
                "Coimbra + Mayo\n→ UC Davis")

loo_egfr <- scenario_egfr_pivot[, LOO_COLS]
loo_dgf  <- scenario_dgf_pivot[,  LOO_COLS]
colnames(loo_egfr) <- LOO_LABELS
colnames(loo_dgf)  <- LOO_LABELS

cat("Loaded LOO results for", nrow(loo_egfr), "models across", ncol(loo_egfr), "folds\n")
```

---

# LOO Heatmap — eGFR Test MSE

```{r loo_heatmap_egfr, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
melt_egfr <- loo_egfr %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Fold", values_to = "Test_MSE") %>%
  mutate(Fold  = factor(Fold,  levels = LOO_LABELS),
         Model = factor(Model, levels = rownames(loo_egfr)),
         MSE_rank = rank(Test_MSE))

ggplot(melt_egfr, aes(x = Fold, y = Model, fill = MSE_rank)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Test_MSE, 0)), size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = -1, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "LOO ComBat — eGFR Test MSE by Model and Fold",
       subtitle = "Lower / Lighter = Better   |   Colors by rank across all cells",
       x = "Held-Out Test Cohort", y = "Model") +
  theme(axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11))
```

---

# LOO Heatmap — DGF Test AUC

```{r loo_heatmap_dgf, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
melt_dgf <- loo_dgf %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Fold", values_to = "Test_AUC") %>%
  mutate(Fold  = factor(Fold,  levels = LOO_LABELS),
         Model = factor(Model, levels = rownames(loo_dgf)))

ggplot(melt_dgf, aes(x = Fold, y = Model, fill = Test_AUC)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Test_AUC)), size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = 1, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "LOO ComBat — DGF Test AUC by Model and Fold",
       subtitle = "Higher / Lighter = Better",
       x = "Held-Out Test Cohort", y = "Model") +
  theme(axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11))
```

---

# LOO Average Performance Across Folds

```{r loo_avg_performance, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
egfr_avg <- data.frame(
  Model = rownames(loo_egfr),
  avg   = rowMeans(loo_egfr)
) %>% mutate(Model = factor(Model, levels = Model),
             is_best = avg == min(avg))

dgf_avg <- data.frame(
  Model = rownames(loo_dgf),
  avg   = rowMeans(loo_dgf)
) %>% mutate(Model = factor(Model, levels = Model),
             is_best = avg == max(avg))

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_avg, aes(x = Model, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg, 0)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_sqrt() +
  labs(title = "eGFR: Average Test MSE Across LOO Folds",
       subtitle = "Lower = Better  |  sqrt scale  |  Green = best",
       x = "Model", y = "Average Test MSE (sqrt scale)") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_avg, aes(x = Model, y = avg, fill = is_best)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", avg)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#3498db", "TRUE" = "#2ecc71"), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(title = "DGF: Average Test AUC Across LOO Folds",
       subtitle = "Higher = Better  |  Green = best",
       x = "Model", y = "Average Test AUC") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# LOO Fold Comparison — Per Model

```{r loo_fold_comparison, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
fold_colors <- c("#2ecc71", "#3498db", "#9b59b6")

egfr_long <- loo_egfr %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Fold", values_to = "Test_MSE") %>%
  mutate(Fold = factor(Fold, levels = LOO_LABELS))

dgf_long <- loo_dgf %>%
  rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Model, names_to = "Fold", values_to = "Test_AUC") %>%
  mutate(Fold = factor(Fold, levels = LOO_LABELS))

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_long, aes(x = Model, y = Test_MSE, fill = Fold)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(fold_colors, LOO_LABELS)) +
  labs(title = "eGFR Test MSE per LOO Fold",
       subtitle = "Lower = Better  |  Each bar = one held-out cohort",
       x = "Model", y = "Test MSE", fill = "Held-Out Cohort") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        legend.position = "top")

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_long, aes(x = Model, y = Test_AUC, fill = Fold)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(fold_colors, LOO_LABELS)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(title = "DGF Test AUC per LOO Fold",
       subtitle = "Higher = Better  |  Each bar = one held-out cohort",
       x = "Model", y = "Test AUC", fill = "Held-Out Cohort") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        legend.position = "top")

grid.arrange(p1, p2, nrow = 2)
```

---

# CKD Stage Distribution

```{r ckd_stage_distribution, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
ckd_long <- ckd_distribution %>%
  pivot_longer(-CKD_Stage, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(
    CKD_Stage = factor(CKD_Stage, levels = ckd_distribution$CKD_Stage),
    Set  = ifelse(grepl("Train", Category), "Training", "Test"),
    Type = ifelse(grepl("Actual", Category), "Actual", "Predicted")
  )

p1 <- ggplot(ckd_long %>% filter(Set == "Training"),
             aes(x = CKD_Stage, y = Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#3498db", "Predicted" = "#e74c3c")) +
  labs(title = "Training Set: CKD Stage Distribution",
       subtitle = "XGBoost — LOO ComBat (Coimbra + Mayo → UC Davis)",
       x = "CKD Stage", y = "Count", fill = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

p2 <- ggplot(ckd_long %>% filter(Set == "Test"),
             aes(x = CKD_Stage, y = Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#3498db", "Predicted" = "#e74c3c")) +
  labs(title = "Test Set: CKD Stage Distribution",
       subtitle = "XGBoost — LOO ComBat (Coimbra + Mayo → UC Davis)",
       x = "CKD Stage", y = "Count", fill = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

---

# Permutation Importance

```{r permutation_importance, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
top_n <- 20

egfr_imp <- egfr_importance %>%
  head(top_n) %>%
  mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = rev(Feature)))

dgf_imp <- dgf_importance %>%
  head(top_n) %>%
  mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = rev(Feature)))

p1 <- ggplot(egfr_imp, aes(x = Importance, y = Feature)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#3498db", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = sprintf("eGFR: Top %d Features", top_n),
       subtitle = "Permutation Importance — XGBoost on LOO ComBat (CM → U)",
       x = "Importance (L1 Normalized)", y = "") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

p2 <- ggplot(dgf_imp, aes(x = Importance, y = Feature)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#e74c3c", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = sprintf("DGF: Top %d Features", top_n),
       subtitle = "Permutation Importance — XGBoost on LOO ComBat (CM → U)",
       x = "Importance (L1 Normalized)", y = "") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```
